---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=./en/index.html">
---

```{=html}
<script>window.location.replace("./en/index.html");</script>
```

<noscript>Loading the English documentation… if you are not redirected, [open it here](en/index.html).</noscript>
